_schema_description: Registry of all generated model cards. Each card entry contains metadata for indexing and gallery display.

_schema_fields.model_id: Unique identifier derived from HuggingFace URL (e.g., 'yolo11m_esa_coral_detector')
_schema_fields.model_name: Human-readable model name (e.g., 'YOLO11m ESA Coral Detector')
_schema_fields.card_url: Relative path to the generated card HTML file (cards/{model_id}.html), relative to gallery/
_schema_fields.date_added: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when card was added to registry
_schema_fields.thumbnail_url: Optional URL or relative path to model thumbnail image
_schema_fields.description: Brief 1-2 sentence overview of the model from README
_schema_fields.organization: HuggingFace organization name for grouping and search

cards.model_name: Nmfs Osi/Yolo11M Cls Noaa Pacific Benthic Cover T1

cards.model_name: Nmfs Osi/Yolo11M Esa Coral Icra Detector
